title: Wget
description: Wget describes the access for an HTTP-downloadable resource.

body.description: Body is the HTTP body to send with the request.

header.description: Header contains HTTP headers to be sent with the request.

mediaType.description: MediaType is the media type of the resource with optional format qualifiers.

noRedirect.description: NoRedirect disables following HTTP redirects when set to true.

url.description: URL is the HTTP endpoint to download the resource from.

verb.description: Verb is the HTTP method to use (GET, POST, etc.). Defaults to GET.
